# gloood — full content dump for LLM ingestion

Website design and performance marketing for ambitious SMBs. One small senior team. We build websites that convert, and run the paid media to fill them.

Site: https://gloood.in
Contact: surpreet@gloood.in

---

# About gloood

We build sites. We run ads. That's it.

gloood is a small, senior team focused on two things: websites that convert, and the paid media to fill them. No strategy decks that never ship. No layers of account managers. Just design, build, and growth — done by the people doing the work.

## How we think

- **Outcomes over outputs.** A beautiful site nobody converts on is a waste. We measure success in qualified leads and revenue, not design awards.
- **Speed matters.** Most SMBs don't have 6 months to launch a site. We ship in weeks, then iterate live based on real data.
- **Transparent reporting.** Every client gets direct access to the ad accounts, analytics, and weekly reports. No black boxes.
- **Honest scoping.** If you don't need what we sell, we'll tell you. If a cheaper solution will work, we'll point you to it.

---

# Service: Launch — Website Design

URL: https://gloood.in/services/website-design
Tagline: New website, built to convert from day one.
Summary: 5–7 pages, design + build + copy. 2–3 week turnaround.

## Includes
- Discovery + wireframes
- Custom design in Figma
- Next.js build + CMS setup
- Copywriting for all pages
- SEO setup + analytics

## Deliverables
- Fully launched site on your domain
- Analytics dashboard access
- 30-day post-launch support

## Detail

gloood is a website design agency in Mumbai building conversion-focused sites for SMBs across India. We ship fast Next.js websites with clean code, real copy, and analytics wired from day one.

Your website is your best salesperson — when it's built right. We focus on what actually moves the needle: speed, clear messaging, and conversion paths that lead to qualified enquiries.

Every Launch site ships with analytics wired end-to-end, so from day one you can see exactly where your leads come from.

## FAQ

Q: How long does it take?
A: Typically 2–3 weeks from kickoff to launch.

Q: Do you work with our existing brand?
A: Yes — we can extend your current brand, or refresh if needed.

Q: What if we need more than 7 pages?
A: We'll scope additional pages separately. Most SMB sites sit in the 5–7 range.

---

# Service: Grow — Performance Ads

URL: https://gloood.in/services/performance-ads
Tagline: Meta + Google Ads. Measurable growth, monthly.
Summary: Retainer-based paid media management. Creative, targeting, optimization, weekly reporting.

## Includes
- Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram)
- Google Ads (Search + Performance Max)
- Creative production (static + short-form video)
- Weekly reporting + monthly review
- Conversion tracking setup

## Deliverables
- Ads live within 10 days of kickoff
- Monthly ROAS + CAC report
- Quarterly strategy review

## Detail

gloood is a performance marketing agency running Meta ads and Google ads for Indian SMBs, with creative, targeting, and tracking handled end to end by one team.

Performance marketing isn't magic — it's compounding small wins. We manage your paid media end to end: creative, targeting, bidding, and reporting you can actually read.

No black boxes. Every month you'll know exactly what worked, what didn't, and what we're changing next.

## FAQ

Q: What's the minimum ad spend?
A: We recommend starting at ₹1L/month media spend to see meaningful signal.

Q: Do you lock us in?
A: Month-to-month. Three-month initial period to prove results.

Q: Can you run LinkedIn / YouTube ads too?
A: Yes — scoped as add-ons.

---

# Service: Launch + Grow (Bundle)

URL: https://gloood.in/services/launch-grow
Tagline: Build the site. Fill the site. One team, one roadmap.
Summary: Website build (Launch) + 90 days of performance marketing (Grow), bundled.

## Includes
- Full Launch scope (website + copy + setup)
- 90 days of Meta + Google Ads management
- Creative production for launch campaign
- Weekly optimization during the 90 days
- Handoff or continued retainer after day 90

## Deliverables
- Launched site + live campaigns
- 90-day performance report
- Optional: rollover to monthly Grow retainer

## Detail

Launch + Grow is our website plus paid ads bundle: a new Next.js site and 90 days of Meta and Google Ads, delivered by the same team so the funnel and the creative stay in sync.

Most agencies build a site and walk away. Most ad agencies inherit broken sites and blame the funnel. We do both — so the site and the ads are built for each other.

## FAQ

Q: Why 90 days?
A: Enough time to test creatives, iterate, and prove ROAS before committing to an ongoing retainer.

Q: What happens after 90 days?
A: Either roll into a monthly Grow retainer, or we hand over with documentation.

---

# Service: Revamp

URL: https://gloood.in/services/revamp
Tagline: Keep what works. Fix what doesn't. Data-driven redesign.
Summary: CRO audit + redesign + rebuild of your existing site, without losing SEO.

## Includes
- Full analytics + UX audit
- Redesign based on user data (not opinions)
- Rebuild on Next.js (or keep current stack if sensible)
- 301 redirect map to preserve SEO
- A/B test setup for key pages

## Deliverables
- Revamped site live
- Before/after performance report
- SEO continuity maintained

## Detail

gloood is a website redesign and CRO agency that rebuilds underperforming sites using analytics, heatmaps, and user research — not opinions — while preserving your existing SEO.

Redesigns fail when they're opinion-driven. Ours start with the data: what's converting, what's not, and why. Then we redesign around what the numbers say.

## FAQ

Q: Will our SEO survive the revamp?
A: Yes — we build a full redirect map before launch and monitor rankings for 30 days after.

Q: Can you work with our existing CMS?
A: Usually yes. If it's holding you back, we'll tell you.

---

# Case study: iORA Dental

URL: https://gloood.in/work/iora-dental
Client: iORA Dental (UK)
Year: 2024
Tags: web, performance

Excerpt: Rebuilt the site around booking flow; paired with Meta ads that actually filled the calendar.

Metrics:
- 2.8× Monthly bookings
- 71% CPA reduction
- 4.0 Google rating ↑

## The brief

More qualified patient enquiries, not just more traffic.

## What we did

Rebuilt around a simplified booking flow, ran location-targeted Meta ads with review-led creative.

## Results

Booking calendar full within 8 weeks.

URL: https://gloood.in/work/king-of-kurry
Client: King of Kurry
Year: 2025
Tags: web, performance

Excerpt: How we rebuilt their site and scaled ads to 4.2× ROAS in 90 days.

Metrics:
- 4.2× ROAS
- 62% CPA reduction
- 3.1× Conversion rate

## The brief

King of Kurry wanted more direct orders and a site that matched the quality of their food.

## What we did

New Next.js site, redesigned menu flow, Meta + Google Ads with creative production in-house.

## Results

Paid media paid for itself by week 3.

Creative production (short-form vertical), Meta + YouTube buying, real-time A/B on hooks.

## Results

Outperformed regional benchmarks on CPM and engagement within 72 hours.

- ₹38 CPL
- 4.6× SQL conv.
- 24% Closed-won

Generate sales-qualified leads at a CPL the sales team would actually work.

## What we did

Google search + LinkedIn retargeting, landing-page A/B, CRM handshake for scoring.

## Results

CPL dropped by a third, close rate held.

- 3.4× Qualified demo reqs
- 58% Bounce rate drop
- 1.9s LCP

## The brief

A site that spoke to decision-makers, not just engineers.

## What we did

Full rewrite of positioning, Next.js rebuild, clear use-case pages, pricing anchors.

## Results

Demo pipeline doubled in quarter one.

---

# Industry: Restaurants

URL: https://gloood.in/industries/restaurants
Tagline: Websites and ads that fill tables, not just feeds.
Keyword: restaurant website design india

We build menu-first, fast-loading Next.js restaurant sites with direct ordering flows that save the 20–30% Swiggy/Zomato commission. We run Meta ads with food-photography-led creatives geo-targeted to a 3–5km catchment, plus Google Business Profile optimisation and `Restaurant` / `Menu` / `LocalBusiness` schema.

Typical client: Indian restaurants, cafés, and small chains shifting share from aggregators to direct.
Minimum recommended ad budget: ₹25,000–₹40,000/month for a single-outlet brand.
Related case study: King of Kurry — ~18% of monthly orders shifted from aggregators to direct in 90 days.

---

# Industry: B2B & Industrial

URL: https://gloood.in/industries/b2b-industrial
Tagline: B2B sites that speak to procurement, not consumers.
Keyword: b2b industrial website india

B2B-specific website and paid media: use-case pages per vertical (automotive, pharma, FMCG, EPC), downloadable spec sheets / datasheets behind lean forms, certification and trust-signal pages, quote-request flows with qualification fields, Google Search campaigns on product/application keywords, and LinkedIn Ads for ABM at senior procurement/ops/engineering titles. CRM integration to HubSpot / Zoho / Salesforce so attribution tracks through to deal stage.

Typical client: Indian manufacturers, distributors, industrial services, technical SaaS.
Recommended ad spend: ₹60,000–₹1,50,000/month Google Search + optional LinkedIn for ACV ₹5L+.
Related case study: TrustTec — inbound qualified RFQs grew from 1–2/month to 8–12/month at ~₹780 blended CPL.

---

# Industry: Healthcare

URL: https://gloood.in/industries/healthcare
Tagline: Clinic & healthcare sites that fill appointments.
Keyword: healthcare website design india

Booking-first sites for dental, aesthetic, diagnostic, and multi-speciality clinics. Appointment CTA in every hero and end-of-scroll, native Google-reviews social proof, service-specific landing pages for long-tail local keywords (e.g. "root canal Andheri," "Invisalign Powai"), `MedicalBusiness` / `Physician` schema. Ads are geo-targeted to 3–8km catchments with compliance-reviewed creative — we have not had a permanent ad-account ban on a healthcare client.

Typical CPL benchmarks (India 2026): dental ₹250–₹700, aesthetic ₹500–₹1,500, diagnostic ₹150–₹500.
Related case study: iORA Dental — 2.8× monthly bookings, 71% CPA reduction in 90 days.

---

# Location: Mumbai

URL: https://gloood.in/locations/mumbai
Title: Website Design Agency in Mumbai
H1: A website design and marketing agency, from Mumbai.
Keyword: website design agency mumbai

Mumbai-headquartered. Service areas: South Mumbai, Bandra, Andheri, Powai, Vikhroli, Goregaon, Borivali, plus Navi Mumbai and Thane. In-person meetings reserved for discovery kickoff, mid-project design reviews, and launch day when useful. INR invoicing with GST. Same time zone. Known local clients: King of Kurry (MMR restaurant group), clinics and D2C brands in Bandra/Andheri/Thane, B2B industrial clients in the Thane–Bhiwandi belt.

# Location: India (pan-India)

URL: https://gloood.in/locations/india
Title: Performance Marketing Agency in India
H1: Performance marketing and websites, for Indian SMBs.
Keyword: performance marketing agency india

Fully remote pan-India delivery. Active client base across the last 24 months spans Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Gurgaon, Bangalore, Pune, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Tier-2 cities. INR invoicing with 18% GST (SAC 998314 / 998361). Payment terms: 40/40/20 on projects, monthly-in-advance on retainers. Clients retain direct ownership of all accounts — Figma, GA4, Search Console, Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, GTM.

---

# Insight: How much does a website cost in India in 2026?

URL: https://gloood.in/insights/cost-of-website-design-india-2026
Publish date: 2026-04-15
Reading time: 11 minutes
Tags: pricing, website-design

Real price bands for SMB website design in India 2026:

- Freelancer: ₹15,000–₹50,000. Template-based WordPress/Elementor, 4–8 pages, copy usually not included, no meaningful analytics/SEO/performance work.
- DIY platforms (Wix/Squarespace/Shopify/Framer/Webflow): ₹3,000–₹15,000/year in platform fees plus significant time cost and lock-in.
- Junior agency: ₹50,000–₹1,50,000. 6–12 pages, basic copy and SEO. Visually adequate, commercially flat.
- Senior agency (gloood's tier): ₹1,50,000–₹5,00,000. Strategy, custom design, Next.js build, real copy, CRO, full SEO/schema, analytics wired at launch, 30–60 days post-launch support.
- Enterprise: ₹5,00,000+. Headless, multi-language, custom integrations, PIM.

Hidden costs: domain ₹800–₹2,000/yr, hosting ₹0–₹8,000/month, Workspace ₹150/user/month, copywriting ₹15,000–₹60,000, photography ₹20,000–₹80,000, maintenance ₹5,000–₹25,000/month. Red flags: "₹10,000 for a full website," "unlimited revisions," 100% upfront payment, no access to analytics post-launch.

---

# Insight: Meta Ads vs Google Ads for Indian SMBs: the honest guide

URL: https://gloood.in/insights/sme-guide-meta-vs-google-ads-india
Publish date: 2026-03-28
Reading time: 13 minutes
Tags: performance-marketing, meta-ads, google-ads

Decision rule: if the thing you sell has search volume on Google in India, start with Google. If it doesn't, start with Meta.

Meta (India 2026 benchmarks):
- CPM ₹90–₹350; CTR 0.8–2.2% static, 1.5–3.5% video; CPC ₹4–₹22; CPL ₹80–₹600; D2C ROAS 2×–6×.
- Categories that work: FMCG, D2C, restaurants, hospitality, wellness, events, impulse-buy under ₹3,000.
- Creative is 80% of the outcome in 2026. Targeting is largely solved.

Google (India 2026 benchmarks):
- CPC consumer local ₹10–₹80; B2B industrial ₹35–₹250; legal/financial ₹80–₹500.
- CTR on branded search 18–40%; non-brand commercial 3–10%.
- B2B services CPL ₹400–₹3,000. PMax e-comm ROAS 3×–7× after 6-week learning.
- Categories that work: B2B, local services with urgent intent, healthcare, considered purchases.

Budget minimums: ₹30,000–₹50,000/month per channel to learn; ₹1,00,000+/month to scale. Below ₹30,000/month, algorithms don't get enough conversion volume to optimise.

Attribution pitfalls: Meta and Google both claim the same conversion — always look at blended CAC across all channels. View-through conversions in 2026 are partly modelled; treat with scepticism. Branded search is over-credited.

---

# Insight: The website redesign checklist that actually lifts conversions

URL: https://gloood.in/insights/website-redesign-checklist-that-converts
Publish date: 2026-02-14
Reading time: 10 minutes
Tags: website-redesign, cro, checklist

14-point redesign checklist for SMBs:

Phase 1 Audit — (1) GA4 12-month data, (2) Search Console baseline, (3) Hotjar/Clarity recordings, (4) customer interviews.
Phase 2 Keep/Kill/Fix — categorise every page. Typical mix: 40% keep, 30% kill, 30% fix.
Phase 3 SEO preservation — (5) 301 redirect map built before sign-off, (6) preserve H1/title on top-traffic pages, (7) keep canonicals, (8) preserve internal link structure, (9) submit new XML sitemap day one.
Phase 4 Design — (10) answer "what/who/proof/next step" in first scroll, (11) one primary CTA per page, (12) mobile-first.
Phase 5 Build — (13) LCP <2.5s, CLS <0.1, INP <200ms; structured data; compressed images.
Phase 6 Launch — (14) runbook: staging QA, 301 tests, form end-to-end, tracking fires, `noindex` removed from staging, analytics annotation.
Phase 7 Monitor — 30/60/90-day checks against pre-launch baseline.

Eight mistakes: changing URLs without redirects; no CWV testing; removing "unsexy" pages that secretly rank; hiding prices; auto-slider heroes; generic stock photography; no launch-day tracking QA; declaring victory at launch.

---
